home.desc: Web developer, UX/UI and graphic designer

about.title: About me
about.desc: I'm Hang — a full-stack developer and designer based in Île-de-France. I specialize in building performant, accessible web applications with a strong design sensibility. A developer & designer passionate about creating meaningful digital experiences.
about.p1: I'm in my third year of a Technical Bachelor's degree in Multimédia and Internet Professions (Web development and interactive devices track). Essentially, my background spans graphic design, frontend engineering, and user research, which lets me bridge the gap between beautiful interfaces and solid technical foundations.
about.p2: I care about the work of digital archivists — the Wayback Machine, internet historians — because they stand for two things I believe in: keeping knowledge freely accessible to everyone, and making sure what we build today leaves a trace. The web is part of human heritage, not just a tool.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, you can find me reading fantasy novels, learning about niche online communities, or making something by hand (crochet, crafts, and whatever else I'm fancying at the moment).

projects.title: Projects
projects.desc: A curated selection of work across web development, graphic design, and UX/UI.
